ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "image_counter" INTEGER /* Counter indicating the sequence of images captured */,
  "current_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the current metric collection */,
  "mean_network_delay" REAL /* Mean network delay in milliseconds */,
  "mean_response_time" REAL /* Mean response time in milliseconds */,
  "classification_time" TEXT /* Time taken for classification in the format of HH:MM:SS */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location where the metric was collected */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device or node where the metric was collected */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_volume" TEXT /* Volume of data processed during the metric collection */,
  "protocol_used" TEXT /* Network protocol used (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, UDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Data Center A) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., latency, downtime) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related metric */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Serialized performance data for archiving */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the historical data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location where the historical data was collected */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device or node where the historical data was collected */,
  "data_volume" TEXT /* Volume of data processed for historical records */,
  "protocol_used" TEXT /* Network protocol used for historical records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback content provided by the user */,
  "submitted_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feedback (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the threshold entry */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., mean network delay) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value at which an alert should be triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to display when the threshold is exceeded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location where the threshold applies */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device or node where the threshold applies */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the threshold */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
